message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate random_mod and datetime to withInlineBlock

- random_mod.zig: Migrate 15 blocks (all distribution functions)
  - genExpovariate, genRandbits, genChoice, genChoices
  - genShuffle, genSample, genGammavariate, genBetavariate
  - genParetovariate, genWeibullvariate, genTriangular
  - genLognormvariate, genVonmises
  - Note: genRandrange left as-is (uses reserveLabelId for BigInt)

- datetime.zig: Migrate 3 blocks
  - genWeekday, genIsoweekday, genDateFromTimestamp

Remaining files use patterns incompatible with callback:
- pathlib.zig (33): comptime function generators
- itertools_mod.zig (21): for loops over args
- ntpath/posixpath (35): for loops over args
- async/json/struct (17): complex multi-line with control flow
